overview: A Nurse Practitioner-run medical spa and men's health clinic offering aesthetic treatments, hormone optimization, and wellness services across Park Hills and Union, Kentucky.
highlights: Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT) with plant-based hormone pellets via EvexiPEL Method
IV hydration therapy and peptide injections
Aesthetic treatments including microneedling, dermal fillers, chemical peels, and wrinkle reduction injections
targetAudience: Men and women seeking hormone optimization, aesthetic treatments, and wellness services.
